author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Try to fix the missing hits in the scintillatrs for the V19 version of HGCal

#### PR validation:

Tested with one script in SimG4CMS/Calo/test/python

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Nothing special
title: Phase2-hgx365W5 Try to fix the missing hits in the scintillatrs for the V19 version of HGCal
